name: The Ætherist
The Augur
The Bodyguard
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {4} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Bodyguard is unveiled, until your next turn, prevent all damage that would be dealt to target player and each creature and planeswalker they control.
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Cathar
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil—{5}, Pay 5 life. (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Cathar is unveiled, exile up to three target nonland permanents until you lose the game. (Those permanents return under their owners' control.)
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Cryomancer
The Flickering Mage
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {4} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Flickering Mage is unveiled, exile up to four target nonland permanents. Return those cards to the battlefield tapped under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Golem
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {6} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Golem is unveiled, target Leader player loses 6 life and you gain 6 life.
Leader players have hexproof and can't be attacked. (Until you lose the game.)
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Great Martyr
The Immortal
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {3} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Immortal is unveiled, up to one target player gains 15 life and up to one target player shuffles their graveyard into their library.
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Inquisitor
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {X}{1} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Inquisitor is unveiled, choose X other target players. They each reveal their hand. For each of those players, choose a card from their graveyard or hand and exile it.
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Marshal
The Mirror Maestra
ability_text:
Undercover (Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.)
Unveil {X}{X}{2} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Mirror Maestra is unveiled, choose a player and X target permanents. For each of those permanents, that player creates a token that's a copy of it.
undercover_condition: Unveil only if another identity has been revealed or if another player attacked the Leader this game.

name: The Oracle
The Quellmaster
ability_text:
Undercover
Unveil {9}. This cost is reduced by {1} for each creature controlled by non-Leader players.
When The Quellmaster is unveiled, tap all creatures controlled by non-Leader players and put a stun counter on each of them. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
unveil_cost: {9} (reduced by {1} for each creature controlled by non-Leader players)

name: The Spellsnatcher
The Summoner
ability_text:
Undercover
Unveil {X}{Y}. X and Y can't be 0.
When The Summoner is unveiled, target player creates X 0/0 colorless Shapeshifter creature tokens with changeling and reach. Put Y +1/+1 counters on each of them.

name: The Supplier
ability_text:
Undercover
Unveil—Discard a nonland card.
When The Supplier is unveiled, you get {m}{m}{m}{m}{m}{m} (six gem counters).
{1}, Pay {m}: Target player chooses a card from their graveyard or an exiled card they own and puts it into their library third from the top.
{2}, Pay {m}{m}: Target player reveals the top seven cards of their library. They put two of them into their hand and the rest on the bottom of their library in a random order.

name: The Warlock
The Banisher
ability_text:
Unveil {7} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Banisher is unveiled, exile any number of target creatures. Draw a card for each nontoken creature exiled this way.

name: The Cleaner
ability_text:
Unveil {8} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Cleaner is unveiled, if it's your turn, exile all nonland permanents you don't control and all opponents' graveyards.

name: The Ferryman
The Gatekeeper
ability_text:
Unveil {3} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Gatekeeper is unveiled, create Cerberus, a legendary 4/8 black and red Demon Dog creature token with menace, double strike, trample, and lifelink.
{2}: Turn The Gatekeeper face down.

name: The Grenadier
ability_text:
Unveil {X} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Grenadier is unveiled, create X plus three colorless artifact tokens named Explosive.
{1}, Sacrifice a token named Explosive: Choose one —
• Destroy target nonland permanent.
• Target player loses 3 life.

name: He Who Comes To Save The Day
ability_text:
Unveil {2}
When He Who Comes To Save The Day is unveiled, the next time target player would lose the game this turn, instead they shuffle their hand, their graveyard, and all permanents they own into their library, then they draw twelve cards and their life total becomes 12. Then that player puts any number of permanent cards with mana value 4 or less from their hand onto the battlefield.

name: The Metamorph
ability_text:
Unveil—Pay 8 life, Discard a card.
When The Metamorph is unveiled, until end of turn, as an opponent loses the game, you may remove The Metamorph from the game. If you do, gain control of that player's identity card and turn it face down if it isn't a Leader.

name: The Oneiromancer
ability_text:
Unveil {X}{X} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Oneiromancer is unveiled, exile the top X cards of each player's library face down.
You may look at cards exiled with The Oneiromancer.
Once each turn, you may cast a spell among cards exiled with The Oneiromancer without paying its mana cost. When you do, exile the top card of target player's library face down.

name: The Puppet Master
ability_text:
Unveil {6}
When The Puppet Master is unveiled, redistribute control of any number of other identity cards. Then turn face down each of those cards that isn't a Leader. (Each player must control one identity card.)
You may look at face-down identity cards you don't control any time.
At the beginning of your end step, draw two cards.

name: The Reflector
ability_text:
Unveil {5}
When The Reflector is unveiled, gain control of target ability, instant, or sorcery spell. You may choose new targets for it. Then copy that spell or ability for each opponent. You may choose new targets for the copies.

name: The Time Bender
ability_text:
Unveil {6}
When The Time Bender is unveiled, choose two —
• Each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library, then draws seven cards.
• Take an extra turn after this one.
• End the turn.

name: The Treacherous Masochist
The Wearer of Masks
ability_text:
Unveil {X}
As The Wearer of Masks is unveiled, reveal up to X non-Leader identity cards at random from outside the game. You may choose one of them. If you do, until The Wearer of Masks is turned face down, it becomes a copy of that card, except it's a Traitor. (It loses all other identity types.)

name: The Ambitious Queen
ability_text:
Unveil—Pay 1 life, Exile a nonland card from your hand. (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Ambitious Queen is unveiled, counter target noncreature spell.
unveil_cost: Pay 1 life, Exile a nonland card from your hand

name: The Beastmaster
ability_text:
Unveil {4} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Beastmaster is unveiled, up to two target players each create two 4/4 red and green Beast creature tokens with trample.

name: The Bio-Engineer
ability_text:
Unveil—Sacrifice a nontoken permanent.
When The Bio-Engineer is unveiled, you get {a}{a}{a}{a}{a}{a} (six nut counters).
{1}, Pay {a}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. That creature becomes an artifact in addition to its other types.
{2}, Pay {a}{a}: Gain control of target artifact.

name: The Chaos Wielder
ability_text:
Unveil {2} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Chaos Wielder is unveiled, choose a card type. Until end of turn, spells you cast of the chosen type have cascade.

name: The Corpse Snatcher
ability_text:
Unveil {4}
When The Corpse Snatcher is unveiled, each player mills two cards. When one or more cards are milled this way, put a creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under target player's control. That creature is a black Zombie in addition to its other colors and types.

name: The Demon
ability_text:
Unveil {4} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Demon is unveiled, target player searches their library for a card, puts that card into their hand, then shuffles.

name: The Depths Caller
ability_text:
Unveil {X}{3}
When The Depths Caller is unveiled, choose a permanent type and tap any number of untapped permanents of that type you control. Search your library for a card of the chosen type with mana value no more than X plus the number of permanents tapped this way, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

name: The Madwoman
ability_text:
Unveil {4}
When The Madwoman is unveiled, tap up to two target creatures. Each of those creatures deals damage equal to its power to its controller. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to and dealt by those creatures this turn.

name: The Necromancer
ability_text:
Unveil {6}
When The Necromancer is unveiled, if it's your turn, for each player, you may put up to one target creature card from that player's graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

name: The Physician
ability_text:
Unveil {X}
When The Physician is unveiled, any number of target players each get twice X plus four rad counters. (At the beginning of those player's precombat main phase, if they have any rad counters, they mill that many cards. For each nonland card milled this way, they lose 1 life and a rad counter.)

name: The Pyromancer
ability_text:
Unveil {6}
When The Pyromancer is unveiled, if it's your turn, it deals 6 damage to target player and each creature and planeswalker they control. If a creature is dealt damage this way, it loses indestructible until end of turn.

name: The Rebel General
ability_text:
Unveil {5}
When The Rebel General is unveiled, if it's your turn, for each non-Leader player, gain control of up to one target permanent that player controls until end of turn. Untap those permanents. They gain haste until end of turn.

name: The Seer
ability_text:
Unveil {X} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Seer is unveiled, shuffle, then scry X. Reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. When you reveal a nonland card this way, The Seer deals damage equal to twice that card's mana value to any target.

name: The Shapeshifting Slayer
ability_text:
Unveil {5}
When The Shapeshifting Slayer is unveiled, if it's your turn, choose a creature on the battlefield or a creature card in any zone other than a player's hand or library. Create a token that's a copy of it. That token gains menace, trample, and haste.

name: The Sigil Mage
ability_text:
Unveil {5} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Sigil Mage is unveiled, you may cast up to two target instant or sorcery cards from graveyards without paying their mana costs.

name: The Sorceress
ability_text:
Unveil {3} (Start the game with this identity face down in the command zone. Turn it face up any time for its unveil cost.)
When The Sorceress is unveiled, you may choose new targets for target instant or sorcery spell. Then copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

name: The Villain
ability_text:
Unveil {5}
When The Villain is unveiled, if it's your turn, target opponent faces a villainous choice — They sacrifice half the nonland permanents they control, rounded up, or they lose half their life, rounded up. At the beginning of your next upkeep, they face that choice an additional time. (They can make the same or different choices.)

name: The War Shaman
ability_text:
Unveil {5}
When The War Shaman is unveiled, destroy up to two target nonland permanents. If none of them were creatures, create an X/X red Elemental creature token, where X is the total mana value of the permanents destroyed this way.

name: The Blood Empress
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
Whenever one or more creatures your opponents control leave the battlefield, choose two. This ability triggers only once each turn.
• Create a 0/1 black Thrull creature token.
• Create two Blood tokens.
• Tap or untap target permanent.
• Target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
timing_restriction: This ability triggers only once each turn.

name: The Chaos Bringer
ability_text:
At the beginning of your end step, roll a six-sided die, then roll again for each player who has lost the game.
1 — Create a 0/1 white Goat creature token.
2 or 3 — Scry X, where X is the result.
4 or 5 — Create your choice of a Clue token, a Food token, or a Treasure token.
6 — Create a Clue token, a Food token, and a Treasure token.

name: The Corrupted Regent
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
At the beginning of your draw step, you may draw an additional card. If you do, choose a card in your hand drawn this turn. Pay 3 life or put that card on top of your library.

name: The Debt Collector
ability_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, each player loses 1 life for each debt counter among identity cards they control. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.
At the beginning of your end step, target player other than you draws a card and puts a debt counter on an identity card they control.
Whenever a player loses the game, draw a card for each debt counter among identity cards they controlled.

name: The Gathering
ability_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• White — Create four 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.
• Blue — Scry 4, then draw two cards.
• Black — Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
• Red — The Gathering deals 4 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.
• Green — Destroy target noncreature permanent.

name: Her Seedborn Highness
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
Start the game with a number of seed counters on Her Seedborn Highness equal to the number of players.
{2}, Remove a seed counter from Her Seedborn Highness: Untap all permanents you control. Activate only once each turn.

name: His Beloved Majesty
ability_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, starting with the next player in turn order, each non-Leader player may choose a nonenchantment, nontoken permanent they control and draw a card. For each player who does, gain control of that permanent and untap it. If no one does, you draw a card.

name: The King over the Scrapyard
ability_text:
Whenever a creature you control dies, if it was attacking or blocking, create a Junk token or a Treasure token. (A Junk token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")
Whenever a spell or ability an opponent controls causes a nontoken permanent you control to leave the battlefield, create a Junk token and a Treasure token.

name: The Lich Queen
ability_text:
Start the game with a number of grave counters on The Lich Queen equal to the number of players.
At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1.
Remove a grave counter from The Lich Queen: You may play target card from your graveyard this turn. If an instant or sorcery spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. If it's a permanent card, it enters with a finality counter on it. Activate only once each turn.

name: The Old Ruler
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
Your starting life total is increased by 20.
Your starting hand size and your maximum hand size are each increased by one.
At the beginning of your first upkeep, create a Blood token, a Clue token, a Food token, a Map token, and a Treasure token.

name: The Queen of Light
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
Start the game with a number of purification counters on The Queen of Light equal to half the number of players, rounded down.
{3}, Remove a purification counter from The Queen of Light: Exile a permanent of your choice. (This ability doesn't target anything. You choose a permanent as it resolves.)

name: The Twin Princesses
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
{2}: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. Activate only once each turn. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

name: The Void Tyrant
ability_text:
(Start the game with this identity face up in the command zone. You are the starting player.)
Start the game with a number of void counters on The Void Tyrant equal to half the number of players, rounded down.
{2}, Remove a void counter from The Void Tyrant: Counter target spell or ability from a nonidentity source. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)
